Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 8.1 84 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Perlsky Is a Perl 5 Implementation of an at Protocol Personal Data Server 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 1122 upvotes, 261 comments
  4. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 659 upvotes, 159 comments
  5. Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 65 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Building a Shell 109 upvotes, 21 comments
  7. Enabling Efficient Sparse Computations Using Linear Algebra Aware Compilers 35 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Kagi Small Web 476 upvotes, 126 comments
  10. Gummy Geometry 46 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. Give Django your time and money, not your tokens 95 upvotes, 20 comments
  12. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 174 upvotes, 43 comments
  13. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 208 upvotes, 54 comments
  14. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 142 upvotes, 38 comments
  15. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 403 upvotes, 127 comments
  16. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 493 upvotes, 202 comments
  17. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 476 upvotes, 218 comments
  18. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 94 upvotes, 36 comments
  19. Why I love FreeBSD 484 upvotes, 243 comments
  20. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 668 upvotes, 385 comments
  21. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 405 upvotes, 247 comments
  22. Font Smuggler – copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 85 upvotes, 44 comments
  23. OpenSUSE Kalpa 46 upvotes, 21 comments
  24. Why Node.js needs a virtual file system 51 upvotes, 24 comments
  25. A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder 89 upvotes, 54 comments
  26. How long does it take to get last liquid drops from kitchen containers? 27 upvotes, 12 comments
  27. Diels-grabsch2: Self Hashing C Program (2019) 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 73 upvotes, 52 comments
  29. The American Healthcare Conundrum 441 upvotes, 461 comments
  30. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 179 upvotes, 431 comments

Last generated 12:00am, 18 March 2026. Source here.
